name: job-app
description: Hand-curate a tailored resume and cover letter (LaTeX -> PDF) for a job posting URL, reading your private profile from a configured data directory.

data_dir.title: Profile data directory
data_dir.description: Your private folder holding profile/ (personal.md, master-resume.md, optional old-resume.pdf) and applications/ output. Recommended: ~/.job-app. Kept separate from this plugin so no private data ships with it.
